subject: SIP weekly update - week ending 13 Feb

content.answer:
HI Ian and all,

Please find attached for review - 1) SIP weekly update; 2) Swarm weekly
update.

Thank you.
Cuiwei

content.question:
thanks

SIP
slide 14
- for ID - BN, why do we need to pitch again?

shall we bundle MY/BN
together so all sellers who sell to MY will automatically sell to BN?

others
- what is the latest around being able to easily port vouchers for SIP?
- for KRSIP, should we start pitching?
or we wait till product is ready?

Swarm

Slide 2
- for OF, are we still losing money on them?

- do we know why ABS is so low for Swarm compared to direct acquisition of
TB sellers?

content.answer:
+ @Ray Wang <ray.wang01@shopee.com> @Hyunji Seo <hyunji.seo@shopee.com> for
KRSIP

Hi Ian,

Please see our responses below in blue.

SIP


slide 14 Emily Pang Jee Suan <emily.pangjs@shopee.com>

- for ID - BN, why do we need to pitch again? shall we bundle MY/BN
together so all sellers who sell to MY will automatically sell to BN?

   -

   No, we are not re-pitching sellers.
   -

   The plan is to send notification to existing IDMY Direct sellers about
   the BN market extension. This is to avoid confusion, as sellers will start
   seeing BN buyer addresses in their orders.
   -

   In the future, for new sellers, MY and BN will be pitched together as
   one bundle.


others

- what is the latest around being able to easily port vouchers for SIP? Ren
Jiahui <jiahui.ren@shopee.com>

   -

   Feature design with SIP biz team is finalized.
   -

   Next steps
   -

      Obtain HQ legal clearance by 23 Feb
      -

      Submit to Feb product request pipeline
      -

      Regional Buyer Experience team to review and confirm priority by
      mid-Mar
      -

   Target go-live: end Q2.


- for KRSIP, should we start pitching? or we wait till product is ready? Hyunji
Seo <hyunji.seo@shopee.com>

   -

   No need to wait till product ready (ETA end-Mar).
   -

   Plan to start RM 1:1 pitching in early Mar and launch KRSIP on 13 Apr,
   subject to HQ legal clearance on pitching materials/TOS (on track, low
   risk).
   -

   Hyunji Seo <hyunji.seo@shopee.com> will share more details on the
   pitching plan, after aligning with the KR SMT team next week post holiday.


Swarm


Slide 2 Peiya Xia <peiya.xia@shopee.com>

- for OF, are we still losing money on them?

   -

   We increased the OF price on 13 Feb. New OF orders are expected to be
   profitable, the whole month is target to breakeven.
   -

   We will confirm with actual P&L data next week, as there is a 7–10 day
   reporting

+ @Ray Wang <ray.wang01@shopee.com> @Hyunji Seo <hyunji.seo@shopee.com> for
KRSIP

Please see our responses below in blue.

content.question: why is non-of abs so much lower than of?
